how_to_use: Treat dynamic_band as comparative motion, not factual certainty.
Single-source AI is capped unless AXI0M/User-Yps relevance or official incident evidence exists.
Security high-signal terms outrank AI hype when exposure could matter.

top_dynamics.title: 2026-009: Critical Vulnerability in Microsoft SharePoint
top_dynamics.comparative_read: Die Dynamik ist verglichen ziemlich krass; nicht automatisch wahrer, aber deutlich bewegter als übliches Rauschen.
top_dynamics.senna_line: Security zuerst. Exposure prüfen, Patchstand sichern, dann erst über Narrative reden.
why: security high-signal: active, exploitation, critical, rce
top_dynamics.summary: On 14 July 2026, Microsoft released a security update addressing a critical Remote Code Execution (RCE) in Microsoft SharePoint Server. On 20 July 2026, WatchTowr identified a proof-of-concept exploit code, and later, successful exploitation attempts. CERT-EU strongly recommend to update affected servers and to rotate…
